import timeit
import json


def benchmark_parse():
    payload = '{"key": "value", "items": [1, 2, 3]}'
    result = timeit.timeit(lambda: json.loads(payload), number=10000)
    print(f"JSON parse: {result:.4f}s")
    return result


def benchmark_sort():
    data = list(range(1000))
    result = timeit.timeit(lambda: sorted(data), number=5000)
    print(f"Sort: {result:.4f}s")
    return result


def benchmark_string_ops():
    result = timeit.timeit(lambda: "hello world".upper(), number=100000)
    print(f"String ops: {result:.4f}s")
    return result


def run_all_benchmarks():
    results = {
        "parse": benchmark_parse(),
        "sort": benchmark_sort(),
        "string_ops": benchmark_string_ops(),
    }
    print(f"All benchmarks completed: {results}")
    return results
